name: SocialBlade
description: Social media analytics Tool: https://socialblade.com/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #753 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map SocialBlade output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
